text:
EXPLANATION: RDKit is a real, widely used open-source software project for cheminformatics. Its official website recommends the citation "RDKit: Open-source cheminformatics" (without specific authors or year) as the standard way to reference it, which makes this a valid non-academic software citation despite the lack of a formal peer-reviewed paper with those exact authors and date.

LINK: https://www.rdkit.org
FOUND_TITLE: RDKit: Open-source cheminformatics
FOUND_AUTHORS: NONE
FOUND_YEAR: NONE
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
